### Types of Changes

<!-- Check all that apply -->

- [ ] `feat` — New feature
- [ ] `fix` — Bug fix
- [ ] `docs` — Documentation update
- [ ] `refactor` — Code refactoring (no behavior change)
- [ ] `perf` — Performance improvement
- [ ] `test` — Adding or updating tests
- [ ] `build` — Build system changes
- [ ] `ci` — CI/CD changes
- [ ] `chore` — Maintenance (dependencies, tooling)
- [ ] `revert` — Reverting a previous commit

### Checklist

- [ ] Code compiles without warnings (`make all`)
- [ ] Correctness verification passes for all affected modes (PASS in CSV output)
- [ ] Edge cases tested: N = 1, 15, 17, 31, 33, 255, 257
- [ ] No hardcoded values or magic numbers introduced
- [ ] Follows project naming conventions (`snake_case`, include guards, etc.)
- [ ] No breaking changes (or breaking changes documented below)
- [ ] Documentation updated (README.md, CLAUDE.md if applicable)
- [ ] Self-review completed
